examples: During the next 8 years, the price even plummeted to 200 tael.
In 1868, the market value of raw silk was 517 tael of silver per picul, by 1875, the price had fallen to 285 tael per picul.
With over 10,000 tael of cash at hand, he should hesitate on whether to engage in foreign affairs or resell of raw silk.
